summary: Iteration 33 Full Regression Test - All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend verified: Individual grid with CSS grid alignment, profile overlay with glass blur effect (backdrop-filter: blur(20px)), Division Hierarchy with correct org structure (Owner→GM, AMs left, PMs→Divisions right), Crew Portal with 5-division switcher, Standards Library (19 standards), QJA page with leader_name field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 33 features verified working. Key changes tested: (1) CSS grid for Individual view - confirmed display:grid with 8 columns, (2) Glass backdrop overlay - confirmed backdrop-filter:blur(20px) + rgba(0,0,0,0.6), (3) Division Hierarchy matches org chart - Owner→GM at top, AMs left column, PMs→Divisions right with arrows, (4) Maintenance has Tim A + Scott W as PMs with Marcus Thompson and Derek Washington crews, (5) Tree has Brad S as PM with Nathan Cole crew and David Park tagged as PLANT HEALTHCARE, (6) Crew portal has 5 division pills (Maintenance, Install, Tree, Plant Healthcare, Winter Services), (7) Standards Library shows 19 standards, (8) QJA page shows 4 crews with leader_name field.

verified_features.auth_gm: Login as GM (ctyler.gm@slmco.local) returns JWT with role=management, title=GM
verified_features.auth_pm: Login as PM (atim.prom@slmco.local) returns JWT with role=management, title=Production Manager, division=Maintenance

verified_features.team_hierarchy_maintenance: Maintenance has Tim A + Scott W as PMs, Marcus Thompson + Derek Washington as crew leads
verified_features.team_hierarchy_tree: Tree has Brad S as PM, Nathan Cole as crew lead, David Park with division=Plant Healthcare
verified_features.team_profiles_names: All expected personnel found (Adam S, Tyler C, Tim A, Zach O, Scott W, Brad S, Megan M, Daniel T, Scott K, Alejandro, Marcus, Derek, Nathan)
